## **2.2.2.B. PI #2**

### **What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?**

Free Route Airspace implemented together with NEFAB and DK-SE FAB states. The airline may choose their preferred routing over the shortest depending on the jet streams, so it may not always be the shortest by distance.

Airspace closures have caused lot of problems when airlines can\'t fly the shortest route towards Asia/Japan and have to fly around those airspaces that are closed. The airspace closures have shifted the traffic flows from Russia to Kaliningrad, and these flights have to use the narrow international airspace corridor between Finland and Estonia, and can not use the direct routing that has been used before the war.
